questionHtml: A type of ecosystem in Brazil is tropical rainforest. Construct a Gersmehl diagram on the outline provided, to show flows of nutrients between stores in tropical rainforests.
markschemeHtml:
Gersmehl diagram showing the following:

a. thick arrow from soil to biomass:

b. thick arrow from litter to soil;

c. thin arrow from biomass to litter;
